scaleCompatibility.relationship: Primary pentatonic - scale tones 1, 2, 3, 5, 6 of F major
scaleCompatibility.rationale: Contains only the most consonant notes of F major (F, G, A, C, D), avoiding the 4th and 7th which create tension. Completely safe for any major harmony in F
scaleCompatibility.voiceLeadingTips: Perfect for improvisation, guaranteed consonance, works over I-IV-V progressions in F. Ideal for creating singable melodies and memorable hooks
scaleCompatibility.recommendedUse: Perfect for improvisation, guaranteed consonance, works over I-IV-V progressions in F. Ideal for creating singable melodies and memorable hooks

scaleCompatibility.relationship: Diatonic parent scale - all seven notes of F major tonality
scaleCompatibility.rationale: The complete major scale in F provides the full harmonic palette. Contains all diatonic chords and melodic possibilities for F major key
scaleCompatibility.voiceLeadingTips: Use for complete melodic freedom in F major. Essential for scale practice, composition, and understanding key relationships
scaleCompatibility.recommendedUse: Use for complete melodic freedom in F major. Essential for scale practice, composition, and understanding key relationships

scaleCompatibility.relationship: Major scale with flatted 7th (F, G, A, Bb, C, D, Eb)
scaleCompatibility.rationale: Creates dominant 7th character by lowering the 7th degree. Perfect for F7 chords and bluesy rock contexts
scaleCompatibility.voiceLeadingTips: Use over F7 chords and I7-IV7 progressions. Creates bluesy, rock sound while maintaining major character. Perfect for modal rock jams
scaleCompatibility.recommendedUse: Use over F7 chords and I7-IV7 progressions. Creates bluesy, rock sound while maintaining major character. Perfect for modal rock jams

scaleCompatibility.relationship: Major scale with raised 4th (F, G, A, B, C, D, E)
scaleCompatibility.rationale: Raises the 4th degree from Bb to B natural, creating ethereal, dreamy major sound. The #4 provides characteristic bright, uplifting quality
scaleCompatibility.voiceLeadingTips: Use over Fmaj7 or Fmaj7#11 chords; emphasize the B natural for color. Perfect for I chord vamps and modal compositions
scaleCompatibility.recommendedUse: Use over Fmaj7 or Fmaj7#11 chords; emphasize the B natural for color. Perfect for I chord vamps and modal compositions

scaleCompatibility.relationship: Relative minor pentatonic - vi relationship to F major
scaleCompatibility.rationale: D minor pentatonic shares many notes with F major pentatonic and works beautifully over F major progressions, adding minor color
scaleCompatibility.voiceLeadingTips: Use to add minor flavor over F major progressions. Perfect for creating tension/release in major key songs
scaleCompatibility.recommendedUse: Use to add minor flavor over F major progressions. Perfect for creating tension/release in major key songs

scaleCompatibility.relationship: Relative minor pentatonic - vi relationship to F major
scaleCompatibility.rationale: D minor pentatonic shares many notes with F major pentatonic and works beautifully over F major progressions, adding minor color
scaleCompatibility.voiceLeadingTips: Use to add minor flavor over F major progressions. Perfect for creating tension/release in major key songs
scaleCompatibility.recommendedUse: Use to add minor flavor over F major progressions. Perfect for creating tension/release in major key songs
